description: Architecting zero-downtime deployment pipelines, integrating security scanning across the entire CI/CD lifecycle, and building AI-driven reporting systems that turn infrastructure data into business intelligence.

Where it all began — my first professional experience in building web applications, igniting a passion for software engineering.
